guardrail: static projection of the public register; no facts added here

data.name: TW -> EU (NTD->EUR directed edge)
data.feasibility_class: Category III (no direct issuance; partnership / coordination route)

infrastructure_overlap.note: TW on no shared wholesale-settlement experiment; EU on Project Agora. At least one end off the shared experiments.

class_basis.instrument: Virtual Asset Service Act, passed at third reading 2026-06-30; commencement set separately by the Executive Yuan, pending nine items of subsidiary legislation (FSC timetable: earliest Q1 2027). Until commencement only the AML registration regime (amended Money Laundering Control Act, operative 2024-11-30) is in force -- registration is not issuance authorization.
